name: Marie's Ultimate "Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and place in a loaf pan.
2. Spray the loaf pan with Pam cooking spray first.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
This recipe was created by Marie Hill, a member of the South Texas Vegetarian Society on the Gulf Coast of Texas. She served it to the Sweeny, Texas, Community Hospital staff at the Healthy Gourmet Vegetarian Buffet, sponsored by STVS in December, 1993. The dish received rave reviews.
